name: EventHandler - IgnoreDamage
description: Verify IgnoreDamage EventHandler loads and can be read

steps.name: Find skill with IgnoreDamage
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); skill != null ? skill.ToString() : null

steps.name: Load EventHandlers array
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers != null

steps.name: Verify _type field
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage") ? true : false

steps.name: Read AbsorbDamagePct parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("AbsorbDamagePct")

steps.name: Read ChanceToApply parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("ChanceToApply")

steps.name: Read RequiredTags parameter
steps.code: var skill = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate").FirstOrDefault(s => { var eh = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(s, "EventHandlers"); return eh != null && eh.ToString().Contains("IgnoreDamage"); }); var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty(skill, "EventHandlers"); handlers.ToString().Contains("RequiredTags")
